---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature, experiment, or improvement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## 🚀 Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## 💡 Motivation

Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve?

## 📊 Use Case

Describe a specific use case or scenario where this feature would be valuable.

## 🔧 Possible Implementation

If you have ideas about how to implement this feature, share them here.

## 🎯 Expected Outcome

What should happen when this feature is implemented?

## 📚 Related Work

Are there similar features in other projects or papers? Please provide links.

## 🔗 Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, or examples about the feature request here.

## ✔️ Checklist

- [ ] I have checked existing issues for duplicates
- [ ] I have described the motivation clearly
- [ ] I have provided a use case
- [ ] I am willing to contribute to this feature (optional)

## 🤝 Contribution

- [ ] I would like to implement this feature myself
- [ ] I can help test this feature
- [ ] I can provide feedback on the implementation
